title: Jiosdo Dough Tools Age 3+ and Cutters, 53 Pcs Dough Tools Sets for Kids Toddlers, Plastic Accessories Clay Extruders Rollers Molds with Storage Box, Creation Educational Toy Gift Set
features: ❤Great Preschool Toys: 53pcs dough toys set is full of tools compound to inspire fun preschool arts and crafts activities for kids, and allow kids to practice the ability of hand-eye coordination and spark their imaginations. Recommended for Ages 3 and Up.

❤So Many Creative Ideas: Easy operation of waffles becomes a little chef in seconds. Create and tell stories with the clay dough tools plus cutters and stamper molds shaped like people, animals, Christmas tree, Star, basic shapes, and more.

❤Eco-friendly Material: Dough accessories made from ABS plastic, non-toxic, lightweight and durable, harmless to your kids. Perfect Size for Tiny Hands, Cutting/shaping/pressing/molding/ rolling for children, make endless creations at home or school.

❤Recyclable Package: The storage case made of sturdy plastic, store and organise all of the dough tools toys. After you're done playing, pack everything back into the case, solve the problem of confusion and loss.

❤Quality Guarantee: Customer is our top priority. If you have any questions or quality problems with this dough tool sets, Please email the seller directly and we will provide a solution to you within 24 hours.
description: Product description 🌈An educational set that supports creativity, great for Hours of fun ✅With 53pcs dough tools kit easy to use tools, there are so many creative possibilities with this arts and crafts toy for kids 3 years and up. ✅Assorted tools that let them cut, roll, decorate and provide lots of options to get kids thinking and creating. ✅Easy to Clean, simply run them under lukewarm water and lay them on air to dry. 🌈Safety Materials Dough toys is made of ABS plastic, colorful, non-toxic and tasteless. Lightweight mold sizes apply to cultivate children to make endless creations at home or schools. 🌈Helpful Learning Kit A variety of dough playing tools models allow to cultivate children's hands-on ability and focus. Constant learning and explore dough to bring the fun to them. 🌈A fun gift for kids A interesting educational toy for toddler/ kids/ children/ boys/ girls as halloween gifts, christmas gifts, new year gifts, birthday party gifts. 🎁Package Include: 24 × Molds 9 × Rolling Pins and Cutters 13 × Waffle and Cutlery Set(waffle maker, knife, fork, cup, plate) 7 × Dough Extruder kit(extruder, extruder pattern and molds) 1 × Exquisite Storage Box ⚠Note: Clay is not included. Color will be random. To be used under the direct supervision of an adult. Safety Warning WARNING:CHOKING HAZARD-Small Parts.Not for children under 3 years.
